PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance required. Pro forma hearing only for purposes of admitting will.

This matter is set for hearing for the purpose of admitting the will with no appearance required. The Court notes that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated October 31, 2022 is admitted to probate. Tia M. Small is appointed the Executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. No bond is required as the sole beneficiary has waived the bond. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on August 6, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Gomez. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
